## Table information : {"table_name":"momovn-prod.CS.CRM_TICKET","table_desc":"Table to store detailed records of customer service tickets, capturing various aspects of the service process and customer interactions. Information that could be obtained from this table includes:

 - Analyzing customer feedback and satisfaction metrics
